title: geranium multiflorum var. ovatifolium
intro: Geranium multiflorum var. ovatifolium, also known as the South African geranium or geranium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and other essential oils. The health benefits of Geranium multiflorum var. ovatifolium include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to improve skin health and wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
